name: NMI
description: NMI is a global embedded payments enablement platform providing full-stack payment technology with REST APIs for payment processing, tokenization, recurring billing, customer vault management, and payment facilitation across ecommerce, in-person, mobile, and unattended acquisition channels.

itemListElement.name: NMI Payment API
itemListElement.description: The core NMI Payment API (Direct Post) enables transaction processing across card-present, ecommerce, mobile, and alternative payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

itemListElement.name: NMI Customer Vault API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Customer Vault API enables secure storage and management of customer payment credentials at Level 1 PCI compliance.

itemListElement.name: NMI Recurring Billing API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Recurring Billing API provides subscription and recurring payment management including plan creation, subscription enrollment, billing cycle configuration, and automated payment scheduling.

itemListElement.name: NMI Query API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Query API provides transaction data retrieval and reporting capabilities including detailed transaction records, customer data, invoice information, and account reporting.

itemListElement.name: NMI Merchant Onboarding API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Merchant Onboarding API enables payment facilitators and ISOs to programmatically onboard merchants through a complete application workflow.

itemListElement.name: NMI Webhooks API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Webhooks API provides event-driven integration for real-time notifications on transaction events, recurring billing updates, settlements, and chargebacks.

itemListElement.name: NMI Three Step Redirect API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Three Step Redirect API keeps merchants outside the scope of transmitting sensitive payment data by routing cardholder information directly to NMI servers.

itemListElement.name: NMI Customer-Present Cloud API
itemListElement.description: The NMI Customer-Present Cloud API enables browser-based point-of-sale payment processing without software installation.
